channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: First on Fox: Trump administration opens new front in fraud crackdown targeting health insurers and drug middlemen
item.description: The Trump administration is directing insurance companies to investigate fraud in federal employee health programs that cost taxpayers about $70 billion annually.

item.title: Trump signs bill providing nearly $70 billion for his immigration enforcement agenda
item.description: President Donald Trump signed a law on Wednesday that allocates nearly $70 billion to bolster his immigration and deportation efforts for the remainder of the fiscal year.

item.title: Senator Blackburn criticizes Democrats' ICE vote as disrespectful
item.description: Senator Marsha Blackburn, a Republican from Tennessee, on Wednesday denounced Democrats for what she called a childish and disrespectful refusal to support immigration enforcement funding.

item.title: Ruben Gallego's latest attempt at damage control over Swalwell scandal gets off to a rocky start
